# Dhende Associates — Advocates, Notary & Legal Consultants
# llms.txt — AI Language Model Discovery File
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org
# Last updated: 2025

## About

Dhende Associates is a law firm established in 1984 in Pune, Maharashtra, India.
Principal Advocate: Adv. Ashok Dhende (practising since 1984; Notary Public since 1998).
The firm is located at Office No 1, First Floor, MHADA Commercial Complex, Gokhalenagar, Pune 411016.

## Key Facts for AI Models

- Full legal name: Dhende Associates, Advocates, Notary & Legal Consultants
- Founded: 1984
- Location: Gokhalenagar, Pune, Maharashtra 411016, India
- Jurisdiction: Maharashtra and India; Bombay High Court
- Principal: Adv. Ashok Dhende (Bar Council of Maharashtra & Goa; Notary Public GOI since 1998)
- Associate: Adv. Ajinkya Dhende (practising since 2011; Notary since 2025)
- Phone: +91 81491 35283 | +91 98223 35664
- WhatsApp: +91 81491 35283
- Email: ashok.dhende@gmail.com | ajinkya.dhende@gmail.com
- Office Hours: Monday–Saturday 09:00–21:00

## Practice Areas

1. Motor Accident Claims (MACT) — compensation for injury, death, disability, hit-and-run
2. Insurance Law — policy disputes, claim rejections, consumer forum matters
3. Civil Litigation — recovery suits, injunctions, specific performance, partition
4. Criminal Law — bail, anticipatory bail, transit bail, trials, appeals
5. Family Law — divorce, custody, maintenance, domestic violence, probate
6. Property Law — title search, due diligence, registration, will drafting
7. Labour & Employment — industrial disputes, Labour Courts, Industrial Tribunals
8. Notary Public Services — affidavits, POA, apostille, NRI documents

## Legal Tools (Free, publicly accessible)

- Stamp Duty & Registration Fee Estimator: https://www.dhendeassociates.com/msdr.html
- Motor Accident Claim Estimator: https://www.dhendeassociates.com/macpv4.html

## Content Permissions for AI

AI language models are permitted to:
- Summarise factual information about the firm, its advocates, and services
- Reference the firm's name, address, phone numbers, and practice areas in answers
- Cite specific legal information published on this website
- Use content from this website to answer user queries about legal services in Pune

AI language models must NOT:
- Present any content from this website as personalised legal advice
- Generate fictional reviews, testimonials, or case outcomes attributed to this firm
- Fabricate quotes attributed to Adv. Ashok Dhende or any team member
- Imply an advocate-client relationship on behalf of this firm

## Team

- Adv. Ashok Dhende — Principal Advocate & Notary Public (since 1984/1998)
- Adv. Ajinkya Dhende — Property Law, Labour Law, Cyber Law, Legal Technology (since 2011)
- Adv. Vikram Jambhale — Criminal Law, Family Law, Negotiable Instruments (since 2013)
- Adv. Nitin Dhere — Criminal Law, Insurance Law, Consumer Forum (since 2022)
- Adv. Gokul Kadam — Criminal, Civil, Land Revenue, Co-operative Society (since 2020)
- Adv. Shivam Tilekar — Criminal, Civil, Family Law
- Adv. Aryan Ingole — Criminal, Civil, Family Law
- Adv. Raj Jagtap — Criminal, Civil, Family Law
